phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Palazzo della Civiltà Italiana is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Palazzo della Civiltà Italiana?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel pah-LAHT-tsoh DEL-lah chee-veel-TAH ee-tah-LYAH-nah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Palazzo della Civiltà Italiana — the Square Colosseum — is the iconic symbol of the EUR district, built for the 1942 World's Fair that never took place.

responses.english: At the end of Viale della Civiltà del Lavoro, visible from afar.
responses.phonetic: een FON-doh al VYAH-leh DEL-lah chee-veel-TAH del lah-VOH-roh, see VEH-deh dah lon-TAH-noh.
responses.french: In fondo al Viale della Civiltà del Lavoro, si vede da lontano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to EUR from the city centre by metro
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva all'EUR in metropolitana?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah al-leh-OOR een meh-troh-poh-lee-TAH-nah?

responses.english: Line B, EUR Fermi or EUR Palasport stop.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah bee, fer-MAH-tah eh-OOR FER-mee oh eh-OOR pah-lah-SPORT.
responses.french: La linea B, fermata EUR Fermi o EUR Palasport.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the artificial lake is

responses.english: In the centre of the park, reachable on foot from the metro.
responses.phonetic: al CHEN-troh del PAR-koh, see raj-JOO-njeh ah PYEH-dee DAL-lah MEH-troh.
responses.french: Al centro del parco, si raggiunge a piedi dalla metro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Museum of Roman Civilisation is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Museo della Civiltà Romana?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel moo-ZEH-oh DEL-lah chee-veel-TAH roh-MAH-nah?

responses.english: At Piazza Giovanni Agnelli, near EUR Fermi metro.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah joh-VAN-nee an-YEL-lee, vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah MEH-troh eh-OOR FER-mee.
responses.french: In Piazza Giovanni Agnelli, vicino alla metro EUR Fermi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if EUR is worth visiting for architecture
phrases.text_local: Scusi, vale la pena visitare l'EUR per l'architettura?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, VAH-leh lah PEH-nah vee-zee-TAH-reh leh-OOR per lar-kee-tet-TOO-rah?

responses.english: Yes, it's unique for its Fascist rationalist style.
responses.phonetic: see, eh OO-nee-koh per loh STEEL-eh rah-tsyoh-nah-LEES-tah fah-SHEES-tah.
responses.french: Sì, è unico per lo stile razionalista fascista.
